base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stone_status — a character from 1987 final fantasy. Stoned/petrified status sprite — grey outline variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stoned/petrified status sprite — grey outline variant
